changeLog: v1.8.0 (2026-07-07) — Added 34 entries, 5 new signers. New RATs: CrystalX (Kaspersky Mar 2026), STX RAT (eSentire Feb 2026), Abko RAT, NodeSnake, MysterySnail. New RMM/remote tools: Zoho Assist (AU scam vector), ToDesk, SunLogin, AweSun, PDQ Connect, ManageEngine Desktop Central. Added Rclone (data exfil tool abused in Microsoft Teams impersonation campaigns Apr 2026). Sources: Kaspersky Securelist, eSentire TRU, Malwarebytes, Microsoft DART, Infosecurity Magazine.
